game_name: Space Quest IV: Roger Wilco and the Time Rippers

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Core mechanic for examining, talking, using, picking up objects; taste and smell for comedic effect
Player must react quickly to avoid game over sequences
Stealing time-travel ships to navigate between past and future versions of worlds
Discover the stakes: AI virus infection, population decimation, Vohaul's digitized mind
Shopping sequences, rescue mechanics, character relationships
Collecting items across time periods to assist quest progression
Optional mini-game with egg-dropping mechanic against enemies; cabinet explodes harmlessly
Confrontation/evasion sequences that drive time-travel progression
High-stakes confrontation with final boss and supercomputer reformatting
Narrative revelation; temporal relationship becomes central to climax

typical_relief_triggers: Ms. Astro Chicken optional arcade diversion
typical_tension_triggers: Deadly situation encounters requiring quick reaction
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Temporal hop-based pacing: introduction in bar establishes stakes, then player oscillates between time periods (future devastated Xenon, past Estros, past Space Quest I references) collecting resources before final convergence on Vohaul's base. Tension escalates through repeated android encounters and environmental stakes revelation.

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Ms. Astro Chicken arcade cabinet in Estros mall represents optional side content; arcade explodes harmlessly suggesting low stakes

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introductory bar scene with point-and-click tutorial; gentle learning of interaction mechanics
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalating stakes across time periods; puzzle-solving via item collection; occasional android confrontations requiring quick reaction
difficulty_curve.late_game: Base infiltration with increased hazard density; final Vohaul confrontation; supercomputer reformatting climax
notable_spikes: Transition to future devastated Xenon (narrative shock, environmental danger increase)
Vohaul's base infiltration and final confrontation (combined mechanical and narrative climax)

notable_level_patterns.description: Bar scene serves as narrative nexus; subsequent locations (Future Xenon, Estros, Space Quest I references) connect via time-travel mechanic. Player returns to Xenon as final convergence point.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Bar -> Future Xenon -> Estros -> Past Space Quest I -> Vohaul's Base

notable_level_patterns.description: Shopping sequences on Estros provide relief and resource acquisition between tension peaks
Each location reveals broader threat scope: bar (revenge plot), Future Xenon (civilization collapse), Estros (continued pursuit), climax (family relationship + existential threat)
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Progression from bar through all temporal locations

notable_level_patterns.description: Ms. Astro Chicken arcade provides low-stakes break activity within higher-stakes location
